execute.stdout: red red green green blue blue

code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut output = ""
mut current = ""
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      if string.is_empty(output)
        output = "#{current} #{current}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{current} #{current}"
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(current)
  if string.is_empty(output)
    output = "#{current} #{current}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{current} #{current}"
  end
end
println(output)
